title: Simply Vanilla
description: 🍃 The original Minecraft, but smoother, more convenient, and more enjoyable to play thanks to improved QoL features !
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/836a7e5e6761b4caf8d26c7da41fdb64285d1ecf.png)

🌿 **A Vanilla-Friendly & Optimized Modpack for Minecraft !**

> **Simply Vanilla** is crafted for players seeking a beautiful, fluid, and optimized Minecraft experience, all while preserving the vanilla core. Whether exploring, building, or surviving, this modpack enhances your journey without losing vanilla charm.

## 🔎 • **a Look to the Mods !**

- 🍃 **for 26.1.2 :**
